text: Daily Reflection: Let's evaluate your development path.
What best describes your current development stage?
options: Complete projects but no impact|Start but don’t finish|Mostly tutorials|Consistent but unfocused

text: What is your most limiting weakness right now?

text: You don’t lack knowledge—you lack consistent execution.

options: Skip them|Google immediately|Try briefly then quit|Break into parts and persist

text: Focusing deeply on one area leads to real expertise.
Spreading across areas without mastery leads to shallow skills.

text: Consistent execution compounds into measurable success.

Your future is determined by what you repeatedly execute, not what you know.
